operating_state: No specific revenue or operating performance data disclosed in the provided filing excerpts. The company held first quarter earnings presentations and an Investor Day in May 2025, suggesting routine quarterly reporting activities.

material_events: JPMorgan completed $6 billion in debt offerings on April 22, 2025, issuing $2.5 billion in fixed-to-floating rate notes due 2031 and $3.5 billion due 2036. The company filed a dividend reinvestment plan prospectus supplement on April 10, 2025. Annual shareholder meeting occurred May 20, 2025, with all 12 director nominees elected and executive compensation approved by shareholders.

forward_outlook: The company conducted an Investor Day presentation on May 19, 2025, providing strategic information to investors across business lines, though specific guidance details are not included in the available excerpts.
